goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'saturday' and should depart from 'london kings cross'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 11:45'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 3' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should be in the 'centre'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '6 people' and '2 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on saturday and should depart from london kings cross
The train should go to cambridge and should leave after 11:45
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should be in the centre
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 6 people and 2 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
